channel.title: Authors on Raghu Hemadri
channel.description: Recent content in Authors on Raghu Hemadri

item.description:
Welcome to my website! I’m a software developer at Oracle, specializing in machine learning. Currently, I’m a member of the Autonomous Health Framework (AHF) team, where I contribute my expertise in developing innovative solutions.

Apart from my professional life, I have a passion for sports. In the past, I was a professional badminton player, and I continue to enjoy playing badminton and cricket in my free time. Sports have always been an integral part of my life, and I find joy and inspiration in the spirit of competition.

During my leisure time, I indulge in researching reinforcement learning. Exploring this fascinating field allows me to expand my knowledge and seek new solutions to complex problems. Moreover, I am very enthusiastic to solve sports intelligence problems. Feel free to reach out to me for any inquiries, collaborations, or discussions related to software development, machine learning, or sports intelligence.
